name: nexus-task-os-root
description: Nexus Task OS — The workspace where execution becomes effortless. MERN Stack project.

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n "server,client" -c "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.start: npx concurrently -n "server,client" -c "cyan,magenta" "npm start --prefix server" "npm run build --prefix client && npm run preview --prefix client"
